## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring/code cleanup

## Pre-Merge Checklist

### Version Management
- [ ] Updated `VERSION` file with new version number (current: `2.2.0`)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` with date and version in format: `## [X.Y.Z] YYYY-MM-DD`
- [ ] Moved changes from `## [dev]` section to the new version section in `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Created new empty `## [dev]` section at top of `CHANGELOG.md` with Added/Changed/Removed subsections

### Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] Self-reviewed my own code
- [ ] Commented code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] No debugging/temporary code left in (e.g., `input()`, `pprint`, commented debug blocks)

### Testing
- [ ] Tested with sample data
- [ ] Tested edge cases (missing files, empty inputs, etc.)
- [ ] No new errors or warnings introduced

### Documentation
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if functionality changed
- [ ] Updated command-line help text if arguments changed
- [ ] Updated `Output_key.README` if output format changed
